title: Feature-Market Fit Matrix — Elevator Guide Rails (NAICS 333921)

sections.title: Methodology
sections.content: Each ZOLLERN capability feature is scored against the elevator guide rail market requirements. Scores range from 0 (no relevance) to 5 (critical match). A weighted total determines overall fit. [SRC: Christensen feature-fit framework]

sections.title: Feature x Market Fit Matrix
sections.content:
| # | ZOLLERN Feature | Market Requirement | Relevance (0-5) | ZOLLERN Capability Level | Fit Score (0-25) | Gap Analysis |
|---|----------------|-------------------|-----------------|------------------------|-----------------|-------------|
| F1 | Hot rolling T-profiles | T89/B, T127/B cross-section geometry | 5 | 5 — existing capability | 25 | FULL FIT |
| F2 | Cold drawing precision | Tight dimensional tolerance on rail head | 4 | 5 — down to +/-0.02mm | 20 | FULL FIT (exceeds requirement) |
| F3 | Induction hardening | Running surface hardness 50-55 HRC | 5 | 5 — up to 64 HRC | 25 | FULL FIT |
| F4 | Straightening | Straightness 0.3mm/m per EN 81-50 | 5 | 4 — currently 0.5mm/m | 20 | GAP — needs precision upgrade |
| F5 | CNC cutting to length | 5,000mm +/-1mm cut lengths | 4 | 5 — automated CNC saws | 20 | FULL FIT |
| F6 | Material grade range | C45, 50CrMo4, S355 | 5 | 5 — all grades available | 25 | FULL FIT |
| F7 | Surface finish control | Ra 1.6-3.2 um on running surface | 3 | 4 — achievable via process control | 12 | ADEQUATE |
| F8 | Heat treatment | Normalizing, Q&T for mechanical properties | 4 | 5 — full heat treatment line | 20 | FULL FIT |
| F9 | Quality certification | EN 10204 Type 3.1, CE marking | 5 | 4 — ISO 9001 certified, Type 3.1 capable | 20 | NEAR FIT — EN 81 type test needed |
| F10 | Bar length capability | 5m standard, up to 12m hot rolled | 4 | 5 — max 12m hot rolled | 20 | FULL FIT |

sections.title: Scoring Summary
sections.content:
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Total possible score (10 features x 25 max) | 250 |
| Actual score | 207 |
| **Fit percentage** | **82.8%** |
| Features with FULL FIT (25/25) | 3 (F1, F3, F6) |
| Features with near-fit (20/25) | 5 (F2, F4, F5, F8, F10) |
| Features with gaps | 2 (F4, F9) |

sections.title: Gap Analysis Detail
sections.content:
| Gap | Feature | Current State | Required State | Investment to Close | Priority |
|-----|---------|-------------|---------------|-------------------|----------|
| G1 | F4 — Straightness | 0.5 mm/m | 0.3 mm/m (EN 81-50) | EUR 200-400K (precision straightening line upgrade) | P1 — Blocking |
| G2 | F9 — EN 81 type test | ISO 9001 + EN 10204 Type 3.1 | EN 81-1/EN 81-50 type test certification | EUR 30-50K (testing + notified body fees) | P1 — Blocking |

Both gaps are **investable and closable** within 6-12 months.

sections.title: Competitive Feature Comparison
sections.content:
| Feature | ZOLLERN | Savera | Montanstahl | VOL-Stahl | Monteferro |
|---------|---------|--------|-------------|-----------|------------|
| T89/B profile | YES | YES | YES | YES | YES |
| T127/B profile | NO (tooling needed) | YES | YES | YES | NO |
| T140/B profile | NO | YES | NO | NO | NO |
| Induction hardening | IN-HOUSE | IN-HOUSE | SUBCONTRACTED | SUBCONTRACTED | IN-HOUSE |
| Straightness 0.3mm/m | UPGRADE NEEDED | YES | YES | PARTIAL | YES |
| EN 81 type tested | NO (investment needed) | YES | YES | YES | YES |
| Material cert 3.1 | YES | YES | YES | YES | YES |
| Custom profile design | YES (core capability) | LIMITED | YES | LIMITED | NO |
| NNS cost advantage | YES (35% material savings) | NO (same process) | PARTIAL | PARTIAL | NO |

sections.title: Market Entry Readiness Assessment
sections.content:
| Dimension | Score (1-5) | Notes |
|-----------|-------------|-------|
| Technical capability | 4 | Core process exists; straightening upgrade needed |
| Certification readiness | 2 | EN 81 type test not yet completed |
| Commercial infrastructure | 3 | B2B sales team exists; elevator-specific contacts needed |
| Production capacity | 5 | 30-40% idle capacity available |
| Supply chain | 5 | Billet sourcing established |
| **Overall readiness** | **3.8 / 5** | **6-12 month path to market entry** |
